title: Narcissus × montielanus
taxonomy: Narcissus × montielanus is a hybrid of the narcissus plant, specifically a cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus obsoletus. This classification suggests that it is a natural hybrid species within the genus Narcissus. The '×' symbol indicates that it is a hybrid, rather than a pure species. As a hybrid, Narcissus × montielanus can exhibit characteristics from both parent species. Its classification is still a matter of study and debate among botanists.
uses: Narcissus × montielanus, also known as the Montiel daffodil, is a rare and hybrid plant species. However, there is limited information available on its specific medicinal uses. Some plants in the Narcissus genus have been traditionally used for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, but these uses do not specifically apply to Narcissus × montielanus. properties: Narcissus × montielanus is known for its potential therapeutic properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effects. parts: Narcissus × montielanus is a plant species known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant's bulbs are used in some cultures to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The bulbs contain compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. intro: Narcissus × montielanus, also known as Montiel's narcissus, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its showy, white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties and is used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The bioactive constituents of Narcissus × montielanus include alkaloids, such as galantamine, which has been shown to have cholinesterase inhibiting properties, and other compounds like narcissine, montine, and montanamine. The most common herbal preparations made with Narcissus × montielanus are tinctures, infusions, and capsules, which are used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions associated with mental health.
